page.title: Reset Password

description.beforeHighlight: Housework Hub is an app to
description.highlight: make housework and shopping visible for everyone at home
description.afterHighlight: . It’s your personal gateway to task assignments and the “My Tasks” page.

notes.sameAccount: ・You can sign in with the same account as the browser version.
notes.sharedData: ・Your data is shared across both PC and smartphone.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in with your registered email and password.

notice.passwordResetSuccess: Password changed successfully. Please sign in with your new password.
notice.emailVerified: Email address verified successfully. Please sign in.
notice.googleLoginFailed: Failed to sign in with Google.

toasts.passwordChanged: Password changed. Please sign in with your new password.

errors.emailNotVerified: Email address has not been verified.

description.aboutSharing: Share shopping lists and housework assignments with your household members.
description.multiHousehold: You can manage multiple households with one account.
description.noteChangeable: ※ Language and profile image can be changed after creating the account.
description.devNote: As this is under development, the email address is only for login. You can use a non-existing email for registration.

errors.emailUsed: This email address is already registered.
errors.failed: Failed to create account. Please try again later.

page.title: Email Verification
page.invalid: The link is invalid or has expired. Please verify again from the sign-up page.

waitPage.title: Verification email sent
waitPage.sentTo: Confirmation email has been sent to "{email}".
waitPage.instruction: Please click the link in the email to complete the registration.
waitPage.spamNote: Please also check your spam folder.

errors.cooldown: Too many requests. Please wait a while.
errors.tooManyRequests: Daily limit for verification requests exceeded.

common.title: Result
common.message: Please close this screen and try again.

expired.message: Please request a new verification email from the sign-up page.

invalid.title: Invalid verification link
invalid.message: The link is incorrect or has already been used.

success.title: Password changed
success.message: Please sign in with your new password.

expired.title: Link has expired
expired.message: Please request a password reset again.

invalid.title: Invalid reset link
invalid.message: The link is incorrect or has already been used.

hero.heading: You’ve been invited to a household.
hero.description: If you accept this invitation, you will join the household and be able to share chores and shopping lists.
hero.notice: If you received this invitation by mistake, please choose “Decline” on the right.

error.invalid: This invitation is invalid or may have expired.
error.acceptFailed: Failed to join the household. Please try again later.

warning.emailMismatch:
The currently logged-in account ({currentEmail}) is different from the invited email address ({invitedEmail}).
Please make sure you are joining with the correct account.

loginNeeded.message: To join, you need to log in or create an account.

loggedIn.confirmMessage: Do you want to join the household “{householdName}” with this account?

sidebar.editingWarning: You cannot switch households while editing.
sidebar.confirmChangeHousehold: Your current changes may be discarded. Do you want to switch the household?

home.intro: You can quickly check the overall status of housework and shopping here. For detailed operations, please use each page (My Tasks / Assignment / Shopping list).

onboarding.title: Welcome to Housework Hub!
onboarding.subtitle: Let's get ready to use the app.

step1.title: Join or create a household
step1.description: First, create a household foundation or get invited by a family member.

step2.title: Create housework templates
step2.description: Register master tasks like 'Cleaning' or 'Laundry' for this household.

myTasks.summary: A summary of housework tasks assigned to you.
myTasks.note: ※ You can update statuses on the “My Tasks” page.

unassigned.title: Unassigned housework
unassigned.summary: Housework tasks that have no assignee yet. Try assigning them early.
unassigned.note: ※ You can change assignees on the “Assignment” page.

shopping.title: Shopping list
shopping.summary: Number of unpurchased items in this household. Shows counts per store and recently added items.
shopping.recentLabel: Items added in the last 2 days

household.title: Household overview
household.summary: Number of housework tasks from 6 days in the past to 6 days in the future. Colors show who has how many tasks (including unassigned).
household.empty: There are no tasks to display yet. Once you create templates and assign housework, the household overview will appear here.

assign.intro: Adjust assignees for housework tasks in this household. Use this page to assign unassigned tasks and balance the workload.

list.empty: There are no housework tasks matching the current filters.

bulk.confirmSkip: Skip all {count} unassigned tasks before today. Are you sure?
bulk.skipSuccess: Past unassigned tasks have been skipped.
bulk.skipError: Failed to skip tasks in bulk.

myTasks.intro: This is a list of housework tasks assigned to you. You can mark them as done or skipped here.

past.title: Past tasks
past.description: Tasks that were scheduled before today and are still pending.
past.empty: There are no pending tasks in the past.

future.title: Upcoming tasks
future.description: Tasks scheduled from today onward. You can mark them as done or skipped as needed.
future.empty: There are no upcoming pending tasks.

messages.doneSuccess: Task has been marked as done.
messages.bulkConfirm: Mark all {count} pending tasks before today as done. Are you sure?
messages.bulkSuccess: All past tasks have been marked as done.
messages.bulkError: Failed to update tasks in bulk.

list.intro: Manage shopping items for this household.

notPurchased.title: To buy (not purchased)
notPurchased.emptyAll: There are no items to buy yet.
notPurchased.emptyFiltered: There are no items matching the current filter.

basket.title: Basket
basket.empty: There are no items in the basket.

completed.title: Purchased
completed.empty: There are no purchased items in the last {days} days.

messages.fetchError: Failed to load the shopping list.
messages.completeError: Failed to mark items as purchased.

create.intro: Add a new item to the shopping list for this household.

image.label: Image (optional)
image.description: You can attach one image. It will be uploaded after the item is added.

detail.intro: View and edit details of a shopping item for this household.

imageSection.title: Images
imageSection.none: No images have been added yet.
imageSection.description: Images are added one by one. Files up to around 2MB are recommended.

statusHelp.notPurchased: The item has not been bought yet. Move it to the basket when you plan to buy it.
statusHelp.inBasket: The item is in the shopping basket. Mark it as purchased when you buy it.
statusHelp.purchased: The item has been purchased. You can move it back to "Not purchased" if needed.

messages.imageDeleteConfirm: Do you want to delete this image?

historyModal.title: Select from past purchases
historyModal.description: You can reuse items you bought recently.
historyModal.emptyAll: There are no past purchase histories yet.
historyModal.emptyFiltered: No histories match the current filters.

favoriteModal.title: Select from favorites
favoriteModal.description: You can select from items registered as favorites.
favoriteModal.emptyFiltered: No items match the current filters.

list.title: Housework settings
list.description: Manage housework templates for this household. When you set recurrence and default assignees, they will be reflected in Assignment and My Tasks.
list.empty: No housework templates match the current filter.

sp.empty: No housework templates match the current filter.

create.title: Add housework
create.description: Register a new housework template for this household. When you set recurrence and default assignees, they will be reflected in Assignment and My Tasks.

edit.title: Edit housework
edit.description: Edit a housework template for this household. Updating recurrence or assignees will also update future Assignment and My Tasks schedules.

basic.title: Basic info
basic.description: Set the name, category, and description of this housework. This name will be shown in Assignment and My Tasks.

recurrence.title: Recurrence settings
recurrence.description: Configure how often this housework should be done: weekly, monthly, or by nth weekday.

assigneeAndPeriod.title: Assignee & active period
assigneeAndPeriod.description: Set the default assignee and the active period of this housework template.

weeklyDays.required: Please select at least one day.

endDate.afterStart: End date must be after the start date.

createDialog.title: Create a new household
createDialog.description: Add a household to manage chores and shopping lists.
createDialog.namePlaceholder: e.g. Parents’ home / Our home / The Tanaka family
createDialog.note: You will be automatically added as a member of this household.

mobile.title: Select Household
mobile.description: Tasks and shopping lists for the selected household will be shown.

settings.description: Manage your account and household settings.

household.title: Household Settings
household.subtitle: Household name, per-household nicknames, member invitations, etc.

about.title: About This App
about.subtitle: Version, terms of use, and more

account.description: You can configure your global display name and the language used in this app.

info.title: Account information
info.note: You can change your display name from the form below.

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.description: Change your display name and language. Changes are not applied until you press "Save".

displayName.title: Display name
displayName.description: This display name is used across Housework Hub. Nicknames for each household (e.g. Mom / Dad) can be changed from “Household Settings”.

icon.title: Profile image
icon.description: This image is used as your account icon. Upload starts as soon as you select a file.
icon.note: Images up to around 2MB are recommended.

language.title: Language
language.description: Select the language used for the UI. This setting is saved to your account.

notifications.title: Notification Settings
notifications.description: Toggle notifications on/off. Changes are applied immediately.

toasts.deleteSuccess: Your account has been deleted. Thank you for using Housework Hub.

delete.title: Delete Account
delete.description:
Delete your account permanently.
All data regarding your account will be deleted and cannot be recovered.

* If you are the OWNER of a household with other members, you must transfer ownership before deleting your account.
delete.confirm:
Are you sure you want to delete your account?
This action cannot be undone.
delete.validationError:
You cannot delete your account because you are the OWNER of a household with other members.
Please transfer ownership or remove members from Household Settings before deleting your account.

displayName.maxBytes: Display name must be within 100 bytes.

google.title: Google Integration

description.notLinked: Link your Google account to sign in with one click.
description.linked:
This account uses Google Sign-In.
Password login is disabled.

google.note: Password login will be disabled after linking.

warning.passwordDisabled:
Password login is disabled because you are linked with Google.
Please sign in using the Google button.

password.title: Change Password
password.descriptionGoogleLinked: Since this account is linked with Google, password change is not available.
password.noteLogout: * Changing your password will sign you out.

household.title: Household Settings
household.description: Manage the households you belong to and your nickname within each household.

list.title: Households you belong to
list.empty: You don't belong to any households yet.
list.note: Details below are applied to the currently selected household.

info.title: Household information
info.nameHelp: This name is used on the household switcher and task lists.

mySettings.title: Your settings in this household
mySettings.description: Set how you are shown within this household. e.g. Mom / Dad / Big sister / Mike
mySettings.nicknameHelp: This nickname is saved as the name displayed in this household and is shown in assignee names and headers.

members.title: Members
members.empty: Loading members, or there are no members yet.

invite.title: Invite members
invite.description: Enter the email address of the person you want to invite and create an invitation link. Share the generated link via email or messaging apps.
invite.none: No invitations have been created for this household yet.

toasts.createSuccess: A new household has been created.
toasts.removeMemberSuccess: Member has been removed from the household.

confirms.leaveHousehold:
Do you want to leave this household?
You will also be removed from task assignments.
confirms.removeMember: Do you want to remove “{name}” from this household?
confirms.revokeInvite: Do you want to revoke this invitation?
confirms.transferOwner:
Do you want to transfer the OWNER role to “{name}”?
Once transferred, you will become a regular member of this household.

danger.title: Delete Household
danger.note:
Deleting a household will delete all data including housework and shopping lists. This action cannot be undone.
Also, you cannot delete a household if there are active members other than yourself.
danger.errorHasMembers: Cannot delete household because there are other active members. Please remove them first.

acceptInvitation.title: An invited member has joined the household.

declineInvitation.title: Invitation declined.
declineInvitation.body: {memberName} has declined the invitation to the household [{householdName}].

removedFromHousehold.title: Removed from household.
removedFromHousehold.body: You have been removed from the household [{householdName}].

leftHousehold.title: A member has left the household.
leftHousehold.body: {memberName} has left the household [{householdName}]. Tasks assigned to {memberName} have been updated to unassigned.

assigned2Owner.title: Set as household OWNER.
assigned2Owner.body: You have been set as the OWNER of the household [{householdName}].

taskAssigned.title: Task assigned
taskAssigned.body: A task has been assigned by {actorName}. Household: {household}, Date: {date}, Tasks: {count}

beDumpedTasks.title: Task requested by another member
beDumpedTasks.body: A task has been requested by {actorName}. Household: {household}, Date: {date}, Tasks: {count}

yourTaskWasTaken.title: Another member took your task
yourTaskWasTaken.body: {actorName} has taken your task. Household: {household}, Date: {date}, Tasks: {count}

generic.title: Task assigned
generic.body: A task has been assigned. Household: {household}, Date: {date}, Tasks: {count}

appInfo.title: About this app
appInfo.description: Here you can check the version of Housework Hub and read the terms of use and privacy information.

legal.description: This section explains the conditions for using Housework Hub and how we handle your personal data.

items.householdVisibility: Chores and shopping lists are visible only to members of the same household.
items.analyticsUsage: We may use anonymized analytics to improve the service.
items.noSelling: We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties, except where required by law.

privacyOverview.note: For details, please read the Privacy Policy.

oss.body: This app uses open source software such as Vue.js, Vite and Tailwind CSS. A full list of licenses will be published later.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: These Terms of Use set forth the conditions for using Housework Hub (the "Service"). By using the Service, you agree to these Terms.

article1.title: Article 1 (Application)
article1.body: These Terms define the rights and obligations between the Service and users regarding the provision and use of the Service.

items.accurateInfo: Users must register accurate information when creating an account.
items.accountResponsibility: Users are responsible for managing their own account information.
items.illegalUseNotice: If unauthorized use by a third party is discovered, users must promptly notify the operator.

items.lawAndOrder: Acts that violate laws or public order and morals
items.serviceDisruption: Interfering with the operation of the Service
items.reverseEngineering: Reverse engineering or otherwise analyzing the system

article4.title: Article 4 (Changes and Suspension of the Service)
article4.body: The operator may change, suspend, or terminate the Service without prior notice.

article5.title: Article 5 (Disclaimer)
article5.body: Except in cases of willful misconduct or gross negligence, the operator shall not be liable for any damages arising from the use of the Service.

article6.title: Article 6 (Changes to the Terms)
article6.body: The operator may modify these Terms as necessary. The revised Terms will take effect when they are posted or otherwise announced within the Service.

terms.note: Please consider having these Terms reviewed by a legal professional before public release.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Housework Hub (the "Service") sets forth the following Privacy Policy to appropriately handle users' personal information.

items.accountInfo: Account information such as email address and display name
items.usageData: Household information, chore templates, shopping lists and other usage data
items.logInfo: Log information such as access time, IP address and browser information

items.serviceProvision: To provide, maintain and improve the Service
items.troubleshooting: To investigate and resolve bugs and failures
items.analytics: To analyze usage trends in an aggregated, non-identifiable form

section3.title: 3. Provision to Third Parties
section3.body: We do not provide personal information to third parties without user consent, except where required by law.

section4.title: 4. Security Measures
section4.body: We implement security measures such as access control to prevent unauthorized access, leakage, alteration or loss of information.

section5.title: 5. Retention Period
section5.body: We retain data as long as the account is active and necessary to provide the Service. When an account is deleted or deletion is requested, we will delete data within a reasonable period.

section6.title: 6. Contact
section6.body: If you have any questions about this policy or our handling of personal information, please contact us via the address listed on the About page.

privacy.note: Before publishing this policy, we recommend adjusting it to applicable laws and store policies and having it reviewed by a legal professional.
